ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Leggi dell’Accademia de’ Sig[nori] Gelati di Bologna
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: col Catalogo degli Accademici viventi nel 1682 [after which there is the Catalogue of the Academy princes 1590-1683 pp. 29-33]
ItacWorkItem.Subjects: Laws of the Academy|Princes of the Academy
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
